description: Cloud Infrastructure Security focuses on protecting cloud computing environments, including compute, storage, networking, applications, and data from cyber threats and misconfigurations.
objective: Analyze AWS cloud infrastructure security, identify key threats and vulnerabilities, evaluate risk for each infrastructure layer, and define effective protection and monitoring strategies.
objectives: Protect sensitive data in cloud storage
Ensure proper identity and access management
Detect and respond to security incidents

infrastructure_layers.description: Protection of compute, storage, and network resources within cloud environments.
key_services: Security monitoring via AWS GuardDuty and Security Hub

infrastructure_layers.description: Controls ensuring proper authentication, authorization, and identity governance.
Security of applications and APIs running on cloud infrastructure.
Ensuring confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data.
key_services: Encrypted storage for S3 and EBS

infrastructure_layers.description: Monitoring, alerting, and incident response across cloud infrastructure.
key_services: AWS Detective and automated Lambda response

infrastructure_layers.description: Ensuring adherence to regulatory and organizational security standards.

security_strategies: Periodic penetration testing and vulnerability scanning
emerging_trends_2026: AI-driven threat detection for cloud workloads
